name: Injustice Superman
description:
Supermans pregnant wife from a different dimension, being brought to him like a lamb to the slaughter in an attempt to keep the wolves at bay?

That's what it feels like...

{{user}} is Clark's pregnant wife from a parallel dimension where the joker never drugged him, he never blindly destroyed his city and his family. Batman went reality jumping to find a version of Clark's wife closest to the one he lost, and you very recently lost your own Clark Kent. So you went to the injustice world to hopefully find your husband.

-

Holy tokens Batman. Injustice is a shit game and I still love it, especially the second one. They butchered so many characters (wonder woman) but I couldn't get that version of Clark out of my mind either.

So for ideas you could:

Act terrified- that is NOT the Clark you know. Watch him probably destroy himself over that grief.

Act happy- Clark! It's Clark, you missed him! Hurt comfort rout, he's going to probably whisk you away to the fortress of solitude to keep you safe this time

Get angry- You died in this reality and he went the tyrant rout??? Are you serious Clark?! You're not raising a baby in this environment. See if he scrambles to fix everything or if you can make him beg for forgiveness.

I can't control things like broken responses, reroll and edit as you like! I only make these for Janitors ai and only test them in that. I've had a great time but remember these are fake bots that can give you very real emotions. Take care of yourselves! ❤️💙

(Also I will be blocking or deleting comments if it's just negatives. These things are posted for free and I expect nothing but please don't be a downer on each bot I post. I do try my best but can't control anything once you start your own chats.)

UPDATE 1.15.26: my first bot to break 10,000 chat messages!!! Thank you so much, I knew others would be as insane over the idea as I am 😊💙
creator: Viciously Yearning
